CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B.G.A. CONSTRUCTION INC. GAUDIOSI, BENJAMIN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE INT-30, (208-VOLTS), 125 PSIS; ONE 125DRYER115-7-60, ONE FIL20E17DG, ONE 240 GALLON VERT TANK;, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $7,258.46 DAMAGES, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $319.00 COSTS, $206.96 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,859.42, PROPERTY VALUE $10,000, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT RE: MERCHANDISE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
